text.title: Agent Context Engineering Corpus Standard Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for agent-context-engineering-corpus-standard.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the corpus reproducible across agents on the same task?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — redaction must be tested + audited
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
